caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned against a solid dark gray background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring a small floral pattern and an ornate embroidered neckline with dark accents. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her shirt. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a small logo includes a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her mouth open and facial expressions shifting. She uses her right hand to gesture, moving it from a position near her chest to a more open gesture and then back toward her body. The camera remains in a static medium close-up shot, focusing on her from the waist up, as she delivers her presentation with subtle shifts in posture and hand placement.
